prompt_text: Funeral washing tools and burial garments in an ancient Chinese noble household, a bronze basin filled with still water and a folded white cloth placed in the lower right foreground, one neat corner of a white shroud hanging on the left, no people in frame, the objects arranged with cold ritual precision and a haunting sense of recent human absence. In the blurred background, the corner of a wooden coffin and a wavering candle flame remain visible, emphasizing the finality of death and the tenderness hidden inside practical mourning labor. prompt_text: Shen Ci, a tall aristocratic young man from ancient China, cold and elegant, sharp long eyes, pale skin, high nose bridge, thin lips, black hair in a neat topknot with jade crown, wearing dark blue and black embroidered hanfu, restrained noble aura, subtle obsession and sorrow in his expression, half-kneeling and leaning forward beside a coffin, both hands withdrawn before his knees, head lowered and refusing to look toward the viewer. Foreground left shows the blurred coffin edge and a strip of white burial robe as if from Gao Lingning's side, creating a limited posthumous subjective view; Shen Ci stays in the right midground, watched from near the coffin. Behind him, white mourning banners and an empty wall open into deep negative space, the visual line running from the coffin edge to the curve of his back.
